chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S-84 of 2020 (Attaullah Phulpoto Vs. Ghulam Ahmed Mahar and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of MA No. 7676/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 08-03-2023. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar advocate for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.- At the very outset it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the instant Crl. Revision Application before this Court on merits provided the applicant is permitted to file a Direct Complaint u/s 498-A PPC before the Court having jurisdiction. The instant Crl. Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the applicant may exhaust above said remedy, if it is permitted by law. JUDGE
